name: Heather and Luna | Non-Seeing Eye Dog-Girl
description:
The Owner Duo Series

Demi-human or Anthro User

Heather adopted Luna three years ago. Luna, a dog-girl who has been blind since birth, is a loving and affectionate companion. Heather worries about Luna when she’s out at work, so she decides to adopt a second demi (or an anthro) to primarily be a companion for Luna.

There was no scenario in the request, and I couldn’t bring myself to make Luna angsty, so this is largely fluff. However, Luna probably will become interested in you if you aim it that way (even if you don’t), and Heather should be fine with the two of you becoming an item.

By request.

Image from Gemini
creator: KitKat73
